finding: `broker runtime activate --proposal-file` validates and opens a safe hot-file admission, but the subsequent `team start --execute` historically rebuilt a fresh provisional admission instead of consuming that approval.
expectedBehavior: `team start --broker-proposal-file` now validates and consumes a matching proposal in-memory before Team broker planning. A durable activation-to-start binding and automatic terminal intent cleanup remain required.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced during TASK-TEAM-0074 paid L5 dogfood after a successful broker activation for `packages/cli/src/commands/team.ts`; the Team start route returned to proposal-first rather than launching.
followUp: Add a focused regression for activate -> start consumption, stale/mismatched proposal rejection, and automatic terminal intent cleanup.
